# Project Kickoff Template

Copy this template into the relevant project note or working draft. Replace placeholders with repository-backed facts or user-provided context. Leave unknown values blank or mark them as `Unknown`; do not invent them.

```markdown
# Project Kickoff Pack — <Project Name>

## Kickoff objective

## Context

- Outcome:
- Scope:
- Non-scope:
- Constraints:

## Connections

| Stakeholder / team | Role | Interest | Engagement need |
|---|---|---|---|
|  |  |  |  |

## Capabilities / working approach

## Cadence

## Initial RAID items

## Kickoff agenda

## First-week actions

1.
2.
3.

## Missing inputs
```
